testimonials.title: Trusted by builders.
testimonials.quote1: BloomX cut our API costs by 40% while improving our P99 latency. The routing engine is genuinely impressive.
testimonials.quote2: We switched from managing 5 different API providers to a single BloomX endpoint. Best infrastructure decision we made.
testimonials.quote3: The verified supply marketplace means we never worry about key quality or rate limits. It just works.

cta.title: Ready to build with liquid infrastructure?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of developers who trust BloomX to power their AI applications with verified, high-availability routing.

seller.title: Join the
seller.subtitle: Apply to become a verified BloomX supplier and turn your idle API capacity into structured yield.

form.successMessage: We will review your upstream capacity limits and KYC details. An invite code will be sent to {email} within 48 hours.
form.terms: By applying, you agree to BloomX Infrastructure Terms. KYC verification required.

overview.integrationDesc: BloomX is fully compatible with OpenAI SDKs. Just change the base URL and pass your BloomX key.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.description: Manage your secret API keys to authenticate requests to BloomX.
keys.noKeysDesc: Create your first API key to start using BloomX.
keys.successDesc: Please save this key somewhere safe. For security reasons, you won't be able to view it again.
keys.warningDesc: Your secret keys carry the same privileges as your account. Do not commit them to GitHub, public repositories, or client-side code.

billing.securePayment: Payments are securely processed by Stripe

settings.teamMembersDesc: Invite colleagues to access API keys and billing.
settings.deleteWorkspaceDesc: Permanently delete your workspace, all API keys, and flush your remaining credits. This cannot be undone.
